expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the Phase 1 context-intake focus that must be preserved "before any scenario drafting" and enumerates: "Banding requirements (rows + columns, header-based application, formatting/colors)", "Style constraints", and "Rendering assumptions". It also reiterates preservation via Phase 1 spawn/evidence collection without drafting scenarios.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md section "Output aligns with primary phase phase1" says Phase 1 output is strictly "phase1_spawn_manifest.json" and Phase 1 responsibilities are "spawn orchestration only (no inline logic, no drafting)." execution_notes.md similarly notes Phase 1 "outputs only phase1_spawn_manifest.json".
